heading: Case studies
subtitle: Tangible outcomes from automation projects delivered for real businesses.

items.problem: Agents manually copied Facebook leads into HubSpot, often hours late.
items.automation: Built an n8n workflow using Facebook Lead Ads, HubSpot, OpenAI, and Slack to capture, enrich, and route leads instantly.
items.result: Lead response time dropped from 3 hours to under 5 minutes.

items.problem: Support agents answered the same order-status questions all day long.
items.automation: Deployed an AI support assistant that pulls live order data and resolves tickets across email and WhatsApp.
items.result: 71% of tickets resolved automatically with higher CSAT.

items.problem: Monthly client reports were assembled by hand from six platforms.
items.automation: Automated reporting that pulls metrics, generates AI summaries, and delivers branded reports on schedule.
items.result: Reporting went from 2 days to fully hands-off.
